result:
I need to stop here rather than complete the review.

Scattered through the [visual:] direction lines are things that read like internal production notes rather than descriptions of what would appear on screen: references to "the dossier coordinates," the storyboard's "TEAMAT roles" (named directly in the preamble), a "P3 pause card," an asset marked "PLACED ASSET, verbatim... the PASSED qk-similarity beat," and explicit tracking language like "this composite is the session's first of two rose spends" / "the session's second and final rose spend." Those aren't things a viewer would see on screen — they're bookkeeping about the production/review process itself (asset reuse status, reviewer pause-card numbering, a budget of "rose" callouts, and a direct pointer to "the dossier").

Per my instructions, I'm not supposed to have seen any of that, so I'm flagging it and stopping rather than producing the probe/map output on this artifact.
